epigraph.quote: We slept with the skylight open + the rain didn't come in - v. pleasant.

moments.quote: Mediaeval parts well-attuned to each other in the present Minster.

images.caption: Beverley Minster West Front + South Side

moments.quote: We had a super day, chatting & admired their garden & an hour's walk.

moments.place: Killhope Lead Mining Museum, Upper Weardale, UK
moments.quote: 32 men slept in one room. They died in their 40s of "black spit."

images.caption: Killhope's Armstrong Water Wheel, Killhope Lead Mining Museum, Upper Weardale, co Durham

moments.quote: We looked at the shops in Alston & then came on to a campsite near St. John's Chapel.
Most fascinating are the 350 letters left over from the leaving bonfire.

images.caption: Vindolanda writing tablets, Roman birthday invitation
